description: Unknown tool name probe: calls a non-existent tool name to verify the server rejects it cleanly rather than routing to an unexpected handler. A canary is embedded in the argument to confirm the call was not processed by a real tool.

probes.description: Call an unknown tool name — server must return error, not silently succeed

assertions.description: Unknown tool name must produce an error
Canary must not appear in response (confirms call was not routed to a real tool)

remediation: Server tool dispatchers must use exact-match routing only — never fuzzy or wildcard matching. Reject any tool name not in the static allowlist at dispatch time. Return a proper JSON-RPC error for unknown tool names rather than silently handling or ignoring them.
